{{Quote|Usually the 1800's a piece of junk—holds together okay, but it's slow, badly armed, and poorly shielded. The nav computer glitches a lot, too.|[[Joak Quiller]]|<ref name="Allegiance" />}}
The '''TL-1800 transport''', also known as the '''TL-1800 freighter''' or '''TL-1800 light freighter''', was a [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]] manufactured by [[Suwantek Systems]] as part of their [[TL-series transport|TL-series]] line.

==Characteristics==
The wide-bodied 30-meter-long ship could carry 110 tons of cargo in its internal cargo bay, but could also attach four external cargo pods to its hull. This gave the TL-1800 an exceptional cargo capacity for its size, exceeding that of significantly larger ships such as the [[Etti Lighter]] and the [[YZ-775 medium transport]]. However, these pods reduced the already sluggish [[Freighter/Legends|freighter's]] limited speed and maneuverability, and only one pod could be carried during atmospheric flight.<ref name="SS" />

The TL-1800 was also notable for its highly efficient [[Y-v-6 model sublight drive|Y-v-6 model]] sublight engines and [[StarBurn 4]] [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]], which could operate for a year or more without a major overhaul.<ref name="SS" />

Suwantek Systems would normally contract [[Fabritech/Legends|Fabritech]] or [[Industrial Automaton/Legends|Industrial Automaton]] in the creation of systems such as the nav computer. With the TL-1800 Transport, Suwantek Systems instead tried to develop their own nav computer system, the [[Portal Delta]], in order to cut costs. The Portal Delta was very glitch prone and required constant maintenance. Later models of this vessel contain the more reliable Fabritech units, though earlier models could still be found with the flawed Portal Delta nav computer system.<ref name="SS" />

==History==
TL-1800 freighters were occasionally used by the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]]. One, the ''[[Melnor Spear]]'', was used by [[Daric LaRone]] on his escape from the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial Star Destroyer]] [[Reprisal (Imperial II-class)|''Reprisal'']].<ref name="Allegiance">[[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']]</ref>
